title: Dances With Dark Matter
summary: You can manipulate shadow and “dark” matter.
tiers: Tier 3: Dark Matter Shroud or Dark Matter Strike
Tier 6: Dark Matter Structure or Embrace the Night
gm_intrusions: Dark matter skulks away as if possessed by a mind of its own.
text: You can manipulate shadow and “dark” matter.
details: You can manipulate shadow and “dark” matter.
